title: Pahudia bequaertii

Pahudia bequaertii is a type of longhorn beetle, which is a group of beetles characterized by their distinctive elongated antennae. This beetle is likely classified into a specific order, possibly Coleoptera, which is the largest order of insects. Further classification may include a family, genus, and species level, with Pahudia bequaertii being the specific species within its genus.
